channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [AYOME] Wardwizard Healthcare Ltd Appoints M/s Upadhyay & Company LLP as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-2027
item.description:
Wardwizard Healthcare Ltd has appointed M/s Upadhyay & Company LLP as the Internal Auditor for the Financial Year 2026-2027. The appointment was made at the Board of Directors meeting held on 23rd March 2026, based on the recommendation of the Audit Committee. M/s Upadhyay & Company LLP is a Limited Liability Partnership firm incorporated on 07 June 2017, registered at Registrar of Companies, Ahmedabad. The firm provides a wide range of services such as Audit and Assurance, Tax Advisory, GST Compliance, Indirect Tax Advisory, Company Formation, Business Advisory, Legal Compliance, and Regulatory Advisory.

  • Wardwizard Healthcare Ltd appoints M/s Upadhyay & Company LLP as Internal Auditor
  • Appointment is for the Financial Year 2026-2027
  • M/s Upadhyay & Company LLP is a Limited Liability Partnership firm
  • The firm provides a wide range of services
  • Appointment is based on the recommendation of the Audit Committee

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AYOKI MERCANTILE LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [CEINSYSTECH] Devika Sagar Meghe Acquires 7,14,413 Shares of Ceinsys Tech Ltd Through Share Warrant Conversion
item.description:
Devika Sagar Meghe, a Promoter Group member of Ceinsys Tech Limited, has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The disclosure pertains to the acquisition of 7,14,413 Equity Shares of the Company pursuant to the conversion of 7,14,413 Share Warrants. The shares were allotted by the Company on March 18, 2026. This acquisition increases Mrs. Meghe's holding to 8.44% of the total share capital and total voting capital of the TC.

  • Devika Sagar Meghe, a Promoter Group member, acquired 7,14,413 shares of Ceinsys Tech Ltd
  • The shares were acquired through the conversion of 7,14,413 Share Warrants allotted by the Company on March 18, 2026
  • This acquisition increases Mrs. Meghe's holding to 8.44% of the total share and voting capital of the TC

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ceinsys Tech Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [RHETAN] Clear Water Commodities Pvt Ltd Disposes Equity Shares of Rhetan TMT Ltd
item.description:
Clear Water Commodities Pvt Ltd, a non-promoter entity, has disposed of 9,19,030 equity shares of Rhetan TMT Ltd, which is 0.12% of the total diluted shares. This disposal took place on the open market. The total equity share capital of Rhetan TMT Ltd is Rs. 79,68,75,000 divided into 79,68,75,000 equity shares of Re. 1/- each. The total diluted share capital of Rhetan TMT Ltd after the disposal is also Rs. 79,68,75,000 divided into 79,68,75,000 equity shares of Re. 1/- each.

  • Clear Water Commodities Pvt Ltd disposes 0.12% of Rhetan TMT Ltd shares
  • Disposal took place on the open market
  • Rhetan TMT Ltd's total equity share capital is Rs. 79,68,75,000 divided into 79,68,75,000 equity shares of Re. 1/- each
  • Total diluted share capital of Rhetan TMT Ltd after the disposal is also Rs. 79,68,75,000 divided into 79,68,75,000 equity shares of Re. 1/- each

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rhetan TMT Ltd | Category: Transmission of Shares

item.title: [RHETAN] Rhetan TMT Ltd's Independent Directors Review Performance of Non-Independent Directors and Board
item.description:
Rhetan TMT Ltd announced that its Independent Directors held a separate meeting on Monday, 23rd March, 2026, where they reviewed and considered the performance of Non-Independent Directors, the Board of Directors, and the chairperson of the Company. They also assessed the quality, quantity, and timeliness of flow of information between the management of the Company and the Board of Directors.

  • Independent Directors of Rhetan TMT Ltd reviewed the performance of Non-Independent Directors and the Board
  • The performance of the chairperson of the Company was also considered
  • Quality, quantity, and timeliness of flow of information between the management and the Board were assessed
  • Meeting was held at the Registered Office of the Company
  • Rhetan TMT Ltd informed stakeholders about the meeting

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rhetan TMT Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KALYANI] Girish Gulati HUF Discloses 5.05% Stake Sale in Kalyani Cast-Tech Ltd
item.description:
Girish Gulati HUF has disclosed the sale of 3,750 equity shares, which is 0.05% of the total share capital of Kalyani Cast-Tech Ltd. This sale was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The sale details are provided in the attached annexure. After the sale, Girish Gulati HUF holds 3.58,500 shares, which is 5.05% of the total diluted voting capital of the company.

  • Girish Gulati HUF discloses sale of 3,750 shares in Kalyani Cast-Tech Ltd
  • The sale represents 0.05% of the total share capital
  • The sale was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
  • After the sale, Girish Gulati HUF holds 3.58,500 shares, which is 5.05% of the total diluted voting capital

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kalyani Cast-Tech Ltd | Category: Sale

item.title: [BHARTIARTL] Airtel Boosts 5G Coverage in Gujarat with 2,750+ New Sites
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Bharti Airtel has deployed over 2,750 new 5G sites across Gujarat in the past 12 months, enhancing network experience for 41 million+ customers. The expansion brings dependable, high-speed coverage to bustling cities, fast-growing towns, and remote rural villages. Airtel's ₹399 recharge pack now offers unlimited data for smartphone users. The company continues to invest in network density, ensuring robust, future-ready connectivity even in high mobility and high usage zones.

  • Airtel deploys over 2,750 new 5G sites in Gujarat
  • Enhances network experience for 41 million+ customers
  • Expansion brings high-speed coverage to cities, towns, and villages
  • Airtel introduces unlimited data plan in ₹399 recharge pack
  • Sustained investments in network density for robust, future-ready connectivity

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHARTI AIRTEL LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SAPL] SAR Auto Products Ltd: Shreyas R. Virani Sells Shares Worth Rs. 47,64,740 in Open Market
item.description:
SAR Auto Products Ltd has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Shreyas R. Virani & PACs Regulations. 201 l. The disclosure is in respect of sale of equity shares made on 19th and 20th March 2026. Shreyas R. Virani, a promoter, sold 490 Equity shares on 19th March and 1510 Equity shares on 20th March 2026. The total value of the shares sold is Rs. 47,64,740. This sale has resulted in a decrease in the total voting capital of the company from 47,64,740 Equity Shares to 41,64,740 Equity Shares.

  • Shreyas R. Virani, a promoter of SAR Auto Products Ltd, sold equity shares worth Rs. 47,64,740 in the open market.
  • The sale of shares resulted in a decrease in the total voting capital of the company from 47,64,740 Equity Shares to 41,64,740 Equity Shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SAR Auto Products Ltd | Category: Sale

item.title: [RAYALEMA] Royale Manor Hotels & Industries Ltd: Independent Directors' Meeting Outcome for FY 2025-26
item.description:
Royale Manor Hotels & Industries Ltd held a meeting of its Independent Directors on March 23, 2026, as required by Regulation 25(3) of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 and Schedule 1V of the Companies Act, 2013. The meeting, which started at 11:30 AM and concluded at 12:00 PM, transacted the following business: a) Reviewed the performance of non-independent directors and the board of directors as a whole; b) Reviewed the performance of the chairperson of the listed entity, considering the views of executive and non-executive directors; c) Assessed the quality, quantity, and timeliness of information flow between the management and the board of directors. This meeting is a part of the company's commitment to maintaining good corporate governance and transparency.

  • Meeting of Independent Directors held on March 23, 2026
  • Review of non-independent directors' and board's performance
  • Performance assessment of the chairperson
  • Assessment of information flow between management and board
  • Commitment to corporate governance and transparency

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ROYALE MANOR HOTELS & INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DODLA] Dodla Dairy Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window Until After Q4 and FY26 Results
item.description:
Dodla Dairy Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in the company's equity shares by promoters, directors, designated persons, their immediate relatives, and connected persons. The closure will commence from 01 April 2026 and will continue until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results for the quarter and year ending 31 March 2026. The date of the board meeting for the approval of the financial results will be intimated to the stock exchanges in due course.

  • Dodla Dairy Ltd announces closure of trading window
  • Closure effective from 01 April 2026
  • Trading to resume 48 hours after Q4 and FY26 results declaration
  • Board meeting date for financial results approval to be intimated later
  • Closure in compliance with SEBI PIT Regulations and Company's Code of Conduct

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dodla Dairy Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VIRTUALS] Kati Patang Lifestyle Ltd. to Raise Funds via Calls on Outstanding Partly Paid-Up Equity Shares
item.description:
Kati Patang Lifestyle Ltd. has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on March 26, 2026, to consider and approve the raising of funds by making calls on the company's outstanding partly paid-up equity shares. This decision is in accordance with Regulation 29 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015. Furthermore, in line with the Company's 'Code of Internal Procedures & Conduct for Regulating, Monitoring & Reporting of trading by Insiders’ framed under SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, the Trading Window for all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives will be closed till 48 hours after the conclusion of the meeting.

  • Kati Patang Lifestyle Ltd. to raise funds by making calls on outstanding partly paid-up equity shares.
  • The decision is in accordance with Regulation 29 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015.
  • Trading Window for all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives to be closed till 48 hours after the meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VIRTUALSOFT SYSTEMS LTD. | Category: Investment
